en.text: from G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2192 (in the sense of its congener G4976); properly, shapeless, i.e. (figuratively) inelegant

senses.gloss_en: from G0001 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2192 (in the sense of its congener G4976); properly, shapeless, i.e. (figuratively) inelegant
